system.description: You pass out and awaken in a half- dream state before the Heart; you have been blessed with its power. You return to life seemingly unharmed - a miracle! But within a session or two your transformation into an Angel, a nightmare creature of blistering unreality and scintillating ribbons of wet flesh, is complete. You're not dead; but then again, you can't die. You retire as a player character. [Ongoing]
